mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH ( member_group_idx, site_id, menu_idx, module_idx, auth_code_id, module_type, add_dttm, add_id ) VALUES ( #{member_group_idx}, #{site_id}, #{menu_idx}, #{module_idx}, #{auth_code_id}, #{moduleType}, SYSDATE, #{cud_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT menu_idx || '_' || module_idx || '_' || auth_code_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH WHERE member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx} AND module_type = #{moduleType}
SELECT homepage_id || '_' || menu_idx || '_' || module_idx || '_' || auth_code_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH WHERE member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx} AND module_type = #{moduleType}

SELECT * FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE homepage_id IN ( SELECT site_id FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE a.member_group_idx = b.member_group_idx AND b.member_id = #{member_id} ) ORDER BY homepage_name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH WHERE member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx}
mapper.delete:
DELETE WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
AND member_group_idx IN ( SELECT member_group_idx FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP WHERE site_id = #{homepage_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.member_group_idx FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD A WHERE member_id = #{member_id} GROUP BY A.member_group_idx
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.member_id = #{member_id} AND A.admin_yn = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.member_id = #{member_id} AND A.admin_group_yn = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND member_id = #{member_id} AND module_type = 'CMS'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.member_id = #{member_id} AND (A.member_group_idx = 7 or A.member_group_idx = 606)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wb_member_group_auth_temp a SELECT b.member_group_idx, b.site_id, b.menu_idx, b.module_idx, b.auth_code_id, b.module_type, b.add_dttm, b.add_id FROM wb_member_group_auth b WHERE member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx}
